headline: Northern Trust, Navient, Carlyle, Voya Financial, and StepStone Group Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the release of a surprisingly weak February jobs report showed an unexpected drop in employment.

headline: Northern Trust Up 12.5% in 6 Months: Buy, Hold, or Sell the Stock?
summary: NTRS stock jumps 12.5% in six months, beating peers and the market, can digital-asset innovation, wealth growth and strong liquidity drive further upside?
